packageRules.description: Group all golang.org/x/* module updates into a single PR.

Bump the go.mod `go` directive itself. This is a library with no Dockerfile, and go.mod has no separate `toolchain` line - the `go` directive is pinned to a full patch version (e.g. `go 1.26.3`) and does double duty. Renovate's default policy never bumps a bare `go` directive (it treats it as a minimum-compatibility floor, not a pinned version), so matchDepNames+rangeStrategy=bump are required to opt in.
